title: Indravajrā — 4×11 vajra-pattern
prompt: Compose a four-pāda indravajrā on the recognition (pratyabhijñā) of the self as already free.
constraint: indravajrā chandas; 11 syllables per pāda × 4 pādas; each pāda must follow the GG L GG L L G L G G pattern (ti-tā-ja-ga-ga).
notes: Validated by tools/sanskrit_chandas.py against INDRAVAJRA (44-syllable count, pattern shape).
